title: Lesson 42
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for food and cooking.

words.example: This recipe is easy to follow.

words.meaning: a machine that cooks food with heat
words.example: Put the bread in the oven.

words.meaning: a small plate under a cup
words.example: Put the cup on the saucer.

words.meaning: a deep round dish for food
words.example: I eat soup from a bowl.

words.meaning: a tool with points used for eating
words.example: Use a fork to eat the salad.
Use the ladle for the soup.

words.meaning: a flat cooking dish used on a stove
words.example: The eggs are in the pan.

words.meaning: a liquid put on food for taste
a small amount of food between meals
words.example: I eat a snack after school.

words.meaning: sweet food eaten after a meal
